name: BLACKSTONE MORTGAGE TRUST, INC.
summary: Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (BXMT) is a real estate finance company that originates and acquires senior loans collateralized by commercial real estate in North America, Europe, and Australia. It operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) and is managed by an affiliate of Blackstone. Its primary business involves mortgage lending and investment in real estate-related assets, funded through various financing arrangements and capital markets activities.
